title: Senior Software Engineer - NoBroker Global Group - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - NoBroker Global Group - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NoBroker Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About NoBroker Global Group:
NoBroker Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker Global Group!
